content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a park scene. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the people, what they are doing, the place, and the weather.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a park on a sunny day. There are some trees and green grass. A family is having a picnic on the grass — a mother, a father, and two children. The children are playing with a ball. There is also an old man sitting on a bench and reading a newspaper. In the background, I can see a small lake with some ducks. The weather looks warm and sunny.
content.tips_zh: 描述图片时，先说整体场景（在哪里、什么天气），然后描述具体的人物和他们在做什么。使用 'there is/are'、'I can see' 等句型。注意使用现在进行时描述正在发生的动作。尽量描述图片的不同部分，不要只关注一个地方。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。你需要观察一张照片并描述你看到的内容。考官会评估你描述场景、人物和活动的能力。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. You need to observe a photograph and describe what you see. The examiner assesses your ability to describe scenes, people, and activities.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a classroom. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the room, the people, and what they are doing.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a classroom. There are about fifteen students sitting at desks. A teacher is standing at the front of the class, next to a whiteboard. She is pointing at something on the board. Some students are writing in their notebooks and some are looking at the teacher. On the walls, there are some colourful posters and a map. The classroom looks bright and tidy. I can also see some books and pencils on the desks.
content.tips_zh: 描述教室场景时，先说这是什么地方（教室），然后描述里面有多少人、他们在做什么。注意描述老师和学生分别在做什么。使用方位词如 "at the front"、"on the walls"、"on the desks" 来说明位置。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个教室场景，注意描述空间布局和人物活动。使用现在进行时描述正在发生的动作，使用方位介词描述位置。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a classroom scene, paying attention to spatial layout and people's activities. Use present continuous for ongoing actions and prepositions of place for positions.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a restaurant scene. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the people, and the food.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a restaurant. It looks quite busy. There are several tables with people sitting at them. In the middle, a waiter is carrying plates of food to a table. A family is eating together near the window — I can see a man, a woman, and a small child. On the table, there is some pasta and salad. In the corner, two young women are looking at the menu. The restaurant has nice lighting and looks comfortable.
content.tips_zh: 描述餐厅场景时，先说整体环境（忙碌/安静），然后描述不同桌的人和他们在做什么。描述食物时用简单的词汇。使用方位词如 "in the middle"、"near the window"、"in the corner" 来描述不同位置的人。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个餐厅场景，注意描述不同位置的人物和他们的活动。使用食物相关词汇和方位介词来丰富描述。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a restaurant scene, noting people at different positions and their activities. Use food-related vocabulary and prepositions of place to enrich your description.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a beach scene. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the people, the activities, and the weather.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a beautiful beach. The sky is blue and the sun is shining brightly. There is golden sand and the sea looks very calm. On the left, some children are building a sandcastle together. Near the water, a boy is playing with a dog. In the middle of the picture, two people are swimming in the sea. On the right, a woman is sitting under a colourful umbrella and reading a book. It looks like a hot summer day and everyone is having a good time.
content.tips_zh: 描述海滩场景时，先描述整体环境（天气、沙滩、大海），然后从左到右或从前到后描述不同区域的人和活动。使用方位词 "on the left"、"near the water"、"in the middle"、"on the right" 来组织描述。加入天气描述让内容更丰富。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个海滩场景，注意从不同方位描述人物和活动。结合天气描述，使用方位词有序地组织你的描述。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a beach scene, noting people and activities from different angles. Combine weather description and use position words to organise your description systematically.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a market scene. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the people, and the things for sale.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a busy outdoor market. There are many stalls with different things for sale. On the left, there is a fruit stall with apples, oranges, and bananas. The seller is putting some grapes into a bag for a customer. In the centre, a woman with a shopping bag is looking at some vegetables. On the right, I can see a stall selling flowers — they are very colourful. There are lots of people walking around. The market looks lively and fun.
content.tips_zh: 描述市场场景时，注意描述不同的摊位卖什么东西、人们在做什么。使用 "There is/are" 描述摊位，用具体的物品名称（水果、蔬菜、花）。描述动作用现在进行时，如 "is putting"、"is looking at"。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个市场场景，注意描述不同摊位的商品和人们的购物活动。使用具体的物品名称和现在进行时描述正在发生的动作。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a market scene, noting different stalls and shopping activities. Use specific item names and present continuous to describe ongoing actions.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a sports event. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the players, and the people watching.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a sports event. It looks like a football match on a large green field. Two teams are playing — one team is wearing red shirts and the other team is wearing blue shirts. A player in red is kicking the ball towards the goal. The goalkeeper is getting ready to stop the ball. Around the field, there are many people watching the game. Some of them are standing up and cheering. I can also see a coach on the side of the field. Everyone looks very excited.
content.tips_zh: 描述体育比赛场景时，先说是什么运动、在哪里进行。然后描述球员在做什么、观众在做什么。使用颜色来区分不同的队伍。描述动作用现在进行时，如 "is kicking"、"is getting ready"、"are cheering"。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个体育比赛场景，注意区分球员和观众，使用颜色描述不同队伍，用现在进行时描述比赛中的动作。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a sports event scene, distinguishing between players and spectators. Use colours to describe different teams and present continuous for match actions.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a playground scene. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the children, and what they are doing.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a playground in a park. The weather looks nice and sunny. There are several children playing on different things. On the left, two girls are going down a slide together and laughing. In the middle, a boy is climbing on a climbing frame. Near the swings, a little girl is swinging very high and her mother is standing next to her. On the right, some boys are playing on a see-saw. There is also a bench where some parents are sitting and watching their children. Everyone looks like they are having a great time.
content.tips_zh: 描述游乐场场景时，先说整体环境，然后按区域描述不同的游乐设施和孩子们的活动。使用游乐场相关词汇：slide（滑梯）、swings（秋千）、climbing frame（攀爬架）、see-saw（跷跷板）。用现在进行时描述孩子们正在做的事。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个游乐场场景，使用游乐场相关词汇和方位词。注意描述不同区域的活动，用现在进行时描述正在进行的动作。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a playground scene using playground-related vocabulary and position words. Note activities in different areas and use present continuous for ongoing actions.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a train station scene. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the people, and what is happening.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a train station. It's a big indoor station with a high ceiling. On the left, there is a large information board showing the times of different trains. In the middle, many people are walking with their suitcases and bags. Some of them are looking at their phones. On the right, a family is standing on the platform waiting for a train. The mother is holding a little boy's hand. Near the entrance, I can see a small coffee shop where some people are buying drinks. A train is arriving at the station. It looks like a busy morning.
content.tips_zh: 描述火车站场景时，先描述整体环境（大小、结构），然后描述不同区域的人和他们的活动。使用车站相关词汇：platform（站台）、information board（信息板）、suitcase（行李箱）。注意区分不同人群在做什么。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个火车站场景，使用交通相关词汇和方位描述。注意描述不同区域的人群和活动，体现场景的忙碌感。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a train station scene using transport-related vocabulary and spatial descriptions. Note different groups of people and activities in various areas, conveying the busy atmosphere.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a birthday party. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the people, the decorations, and what everyone is doing.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a birthday party in a living room. The room is decorated with colourful balloons and streamers. In the middle of the table, there is a big birthday cake with candles on it. A girl is standing in front of the cake and she is about to blow out the candles. Her friends are standing around her and clapping. On the left, some children are wearing party hats and smiling. On the right, a woman — probably the girl's mother — is taking a photo. There are plates of food and drinks on the table. Everyone looks very happy.
content.tips_zh: 描述生日派对场景时，先说地点和装饰，然后描述主角和其他人在做什么。使用派对相关词汇：balloons（气球）、streamers（彩带）、party hats（派对帽）、candles（蜡烛）。注意描述不同人的动作和表情。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个生日派对场景，使用派对装饰相关词汇。注意描述主角和每个人的不同活动，以及他们的表情和心情。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a birthday party scene using party decoration vocabulary. Note the main person and different activities of each person, including their expressions and mood.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a library. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the people, and what they are doing.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a library. It is a large, quiet room with tall bookshelves full of books. On the left, a young boy is sitting at a table and reading a thick book. He looks very concentrated. In the middle, a woman is standing near a bookshelf and looking for a book. She is reaching up to a high shelf. On the right, two students are sitting together and working on their laptops. Near the front desk, a librarian is helping someone borrow some books. The library looks peaceful and well-organised.
content.tips_zh: 描述图书馆场景时，先说整体环境（安静、大、书架），然后描述不同区域的人在做什么。使用图书馆相关词汇：bookshelves（书架）、librarian（图书管理员）、borrow（借）。用形容词如 "quiet"、"peaceful"、"concentrated" 来描述氛围和人的状态。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个图书馆场景，注意描述安静的氛围和不同人的活动。使用图书馆相关词汇和描述氛围的形容词。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a library scene, noting the quiet atmosphere and different people's activities. Use library-related vocabulary and atmosphere-describing adjectives.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a supermarket. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the shoppers, and the products.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see the inside of a big supermarket. There are long rows of shelves with many different products. On the left, I can see the fruit and vegetable section with apples, oranges, and tomatoes. A woman is choosing some bananas and putting them in a plastic bag. In the middle, a man is pushing a shopping trolley. It's quite full already. On the right, there is a section with bread and cakes. Near the checkout area at the front, some people are queuing to pay. The supermarket looks busy and well-stocked.
content.tips_zh: 描述超市场景时，先说整体环境（大、货架多），然后按区域描述不同的商品和人们的购物活动。使用超市相关词汇：shelves（货架）、shopping trolley（购物车）、checkout（收银台）、queue（排队）。描述人们的动作用现在进行时。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个超市场景，按区域描述不同的商品和购物者的活动。使用超市相关词汇和现在进行时。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a supermarket scene by area, noting products and shoppers' activities. Use supermarket vocabulary and present continuous.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a school canteen at lunchtime. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the students, and the food.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a school canteen during lunchtime. It's a big, bright room with many tables and chairs. On the left, some students are queuing up at the food counter to get their lunch. A dinner lady is serving rice and vegetables. In the middle, several groups of students are sitting together and eating. They are talking and laughing. On the right, two boys are carrying their trays to find a table. I can see different foods like rice, noodles, and fruit on the tables. The canteen looks busy and noisy.
content.tips_zh: 描述学校食堂场景时，先说整体环境，然后描述学生们在做什么。使用食堂相关词汇：food counter（取餐台）、tray（托盘）、queue up（排队）、dinner lady（食堂阿姨）。注意描述不同区域——排队区、就餐区等。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个学校食堂场景，注意描述不同区域的活动。使用食堂相关词汇和现在进行时描述学生们的活动。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a school canteen scene, noting activities in different areas. Use canteen vocabulary and present continuous for students' activities.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a street in a city. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the buildings, the people, and the traffic.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a busy city street. There are tall buildings on both sides of the road. On the left, there are some shops and a cafe with tables outside. Some people are sitting at the cafe and drinking coffee. In the middle of the road, there are cars and a bus. A woman is crossing the street at a pedestrian crossing. On the right, I can see a man walking his dog on the pavement. There is also a street lamp and some trees along the road. The weather looks sunny and the sky is blue.
content.tips_zh: 描述城市街道场景时，先说整体环境（繁忙/安静），然后描述道路两侧的建筑和人们的活动。使用城市相关词汇：pavement（人行道）、pedestrian crossing（人行横道）、street lamp（路灯）。注意区分道路上和两侧的不同活动。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个城市街道场景，注意描述建筑、行人和交通。使用城市相关词汇和方位介词来组织描述。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a city street scene, noting buildings, pedestrians, and traffic. Use city vocabulary and prepositions to organise the description.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a kitchen. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the room, the person, and what they are cooking.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a kitchen. It looks clean and modern. On the left, there is a fridge and some cupboards. In the middle, a woman is standing at the cooker and stirring something in a big pot. She is wearing an apron. On the counter next to her, I can see some chopped vegetables — carrots, onions, and tomatoes. On the right, there is a sink with some dishes in it. There is also a shelf with some jars and bottles of spices. It smells like she is making a soup or a stew. The kitchen is warm and welcoming.
content.tips_zh: 描述厨房场景时，先说整体环境（干净、现代），然后描述厨房里的设备和人在做什么。使用厨房相关词汇：cooker（灶台）、fridge（冰箱）、counter（台面）、sink（水槽）、cupboard（橱柜）。描述烹饪动作用现在进行时。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个厨房场景，使用厨房设备和烹饪相关词汇。注意描述人在做什么和厨房里有什么食材。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a kitchen scene using kitchen equipment and cooking vocabulary. Note what the person is doing and what ingredients are visible.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a family room on a rainy evening. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the room, the family members, and the atmosphere.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a family in their living room on a rainy evening. Through the window, I can see rain falling outside and it looks dark. Inside, the room is warm and cosy. On the left, a father is sitting in an armchair and reading a newspaper. In the middle, a mother and her daughter are sitting on the sofa. The mother is knitting and the daughter is drawing in a colouring book. On the right, a boy is lying on the floor and playing with a cat. There is a lamp on and the room has a warm, golden light. Everyone looks relaxed and comfortable.
content.tips_zh: 描述家庭室内场景时，先说整体氛围（温暖、舒适），然后描述每个家庭成员在做什么。注意室内外的对比（外面下雨，里面温暖）。使用描述氛围的形容词如 "warm"、"cosy"、"relaxed"。使用方位词组织描述。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个家庭室内场景，注意描述整体氛围和每个人的活动。使用描述氛围的形容词，体现室内外的对比。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a family living room scene, noting the overall atmosphere and each person's activity. Use atmosphere adjectives and show the contrast between inside and outside.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a school sports day. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the event, the students, and the spectators.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a school sports day on a large playing field. The weather is sunny and there are white clouds in the sky. In the centre, some students are running in a race on a track. A boy in a green shirt is running very fast and he is in first place. On the left, some students are waiting for their turn to race. They look nervous and excited. On the right, parents and teachers are sitting on chairs and watching the races. Some of them are clapping and cheering. In the background, I can see a banner that says 'Sports Day' and some flags. It looks like a very exciting and fun event.
content.tips_zh: 描述运动会场景时，先说整体环境（操场、天气），然后描述不同区域的活动：比赛区、等候区、观众区。使用运动会相关词汇：track（跑道）、race（赛跑）、banner（横幅）。描述人物的表情和情绪，如 "nervous"、"excited"、"cheering"。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个学校运动会场景，区分不同区域的活动。使用运动会相关词汇和描述情绪的形容词。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a school sports day scene, distinguishing activities in different areas. Use sports day vocabulary and emotion-describing adjectives.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a pet shop. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the shop, the animals, and the people.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a pet shop. There are many different animals in the shop. On the left, I can see some fish in big tanks — they are very colourful. In the middle, there are cages with hamsters and rabbits. A little girl is looking at a white rabbit and smiling. Her mother is standing behind her. On the right, there are some puppies in a pen. One puppy is sleeping and another is wagging its tail. A shop worker is feeding the puppies. There are also shelves with pet food and toys. The shop looks clean and friendly.
content.tips_zh: 描述宠物店场景时，先说整体环境，然后按区域描述不同的动物和人的活动。使用宠物相关词汇：tank（鱼缸）、cage（笼子）、pen（围栏）、wag（摇尾巴）。描述动物的外观和动作让描述更生动。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个宠物店场景，按区域描述不同的动物。使用宠物相关词汇和动作描述来让描述更生动。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a pet shop scene, describing different animals by area. Use pet vocabulary and action descriptions to make it vivid.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a school art class. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the classroom, the students, and what they are making.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a school art class. The room is very colourful and creative. On the left, some students are sitting at tables and painting pictures with watercolours. Their paintings are on big white paper. In the middle, a teacher is helping a student mix colours on a palette. She is showing him how to make green by mixing blue and yellow. On the right, two girls are making something with clay — it looks like a small animal. On the walls, there are many beautiful paintings and drawings made by students. There are also pots of brushes and tubes of paint on the tables. Everyone looks busy and creative.
content.tips_zh: 描述美术课场景时，先说整体环境（色彩丰富），然后描述学生们在做什么。使用美术相关词汇：watercolours（水彩）、palette（调色板）、clay（黏土）、brushes（画笔）。注意描述老师和学生之间的互动。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个美术课场景，使用美术相关词汇。注意描述师生互动和学生们的创作活动。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe an art class scene using art-related vocabulary. Note teacher-student interactions and students' creative activities.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of an airport departure hall. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the place, the travellers, and what is happening.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see an airport departure hall. It is very big and modern with high glass windows. On the left, there are some check-in desks and people are queuing with their suitcases. A woman is showing her passport to the staff member. In the middle, many people are walking towards the departure gates. Some are pulling wheeled suitcases and some are carrying backpacks. On the right, there is a row of shops and a coffee shop. A man is sitting at a table and looking at his phone while drinking coffee. There are also some information screens showing flight times. The airport looks very busy.
content.tips_zh: 描述机场场景时，先说整体环境（大、现代），然后描述不同区域的活动。使用机场相关词汇：check-in desk（值机柜台）、passport（护照）、departure gate（登机口）、suitcase（行李箱）。描述不同人的动作和目的。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个机场场景，使用机场相关词汇和方位描述。注意描述不同区域旅客的活动。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe an airport scene using airport vocabulary and spatial descriptions. Note travellers' activities in different areas.

content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a school science lab. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the room, the students, and the experiment.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a school science lab. The room has long tables with special equipment on them. On the left, two students are wearing safety goggles and looking at a test tube. It has a blue liquid inside. Their teacher is standing next to them and explaining something. In the middle, a girl is using a microscope to look at something very small. She looks very interested. On the right, some students are writing down their results in a notebook. On the table, I can see beakers, bottles of chemicals, and a Bunsen burner. The science lab looks interesting but also a bit messy.
content.tips_zh: 描述科学实验室场景时，先说整体环境（专业设备），然后描述学生们在做什么实验。使用实验室相关词汇：test tube（试管）、microscope（显微镜）、beaker（烧杯）、safety goggles（安全护目镜）、Bunsen burner（本生灯）。描述学生们的表情和态度。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。描述一个学校科学实验室场景，使用实验室相关词汇。注意描述学生的实验活动和老师的指导。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. Describe a school science lab scene using lab vocabulary. Note students' experimental activities and teacher guidance.
